question.label: Blockers insight
question.name: What's currently blocking your progress on tasks that we haven't discussed yet?
question.description: Encourages a deeper exploration of obstacles that might not have been previously identified.

answer: Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.

assessment.note: Priya expressed pride in owning the migration plan, indicating a positive engagement with her work.

new_queue.label: Billing rewrite clarity
new_queue.name: What specific information do you need about the billing rewrite to feel more engaged and prepared?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.
